query: Before you touch the code, investigate why saved drafts disappear after restart and prove the root cause and blast radius.
A deep link can open an arbitrary local project path. Root-cause the specific bug, follow the path to the filesystem boundary, and do not patch yet.
This PR changed our API response shape and one client now crashes. Audit the regression against main before proposing a fix.
Queue messages are sometimes acknowledged without being processed. Trace the causal path and tell me whether this is a real defect.
The React status panel says a job is running when nothing is active. Investigate the state propagation without redesigning the UI.
Our timestamp migration appears to shift some rows by a day. Perform an evidence-first audit before anyone edits the migration.
The feature flag is off in staging but the behavior remains enabled. Find whether config precedence, caching, or code is responsible.
The generated TypeScript client accepts a field that the server rejects. Map the generated code to its schema and isolate the contract mismatch.
Our coding agent loops after a tool result and falsely reports success. Audit the prompt, tool schema, state transition, and termination path before fixing it.
Use $center-audit on the failing persistDraft test and return a repair contract, not an implementation.
Review this entire repository for code quality, maintainability, architecture, security, and performance issues.
Refactor this 900-line function into clean modules and modernize the code while you are there.
Build a new chain-builder feature with drag and drop, templates, and per-step budgets.
Change the button color, spacing, and border radius to match the mockup.
The root cause is already proven: the boolean is inverted on line 88. Flip it and run the existing regression test.
Write unit tests for this already-correct utility function and increase coverage.
Explain what this stack trace means in plain English. I am not asking you to inspect the repository.
Do a broad security audit and threat model for the whole application.
Upgrade all dependencies, replace deprecated APIs, and clean up the lockfile.
Optimize the whole monorepo for faster builds and smaller bundles.
